---
title: "Publications"
---

## Articles

### 2026

<div class="pub">
Blasco et al.: *Variability Antarctica*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">ClimTip</span> <span class="pub-project">TIPMIP</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Bochow, N., Hess, P., Robinson, A.: *Physics-constrained generative machine learning-based high-resolution downscaling of Greenland's surface mass balance and surface temperature*. The Cryosphere. <span class="pub-status">in revision</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Bochow, N., Kroenke, J., Garbe, J., Wunderling, N.: *Informing low-order models of climate tipping elements using outputs from higher-complexity Earth system models*. Earth System Dynamics. <span class="pub-status">submitted</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Grusdt, B. et al.: *Strategies for learning from model ensembles*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Hebert, R. et al.: *Inferring climate from pollen*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *Simulating the impact of an AMOC weakening on the Antarctic Ice Sheet using a coupled climate and ice sheet model*. <span class="pub-status">in review</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *Millennial-scale oscillations in the Southern Ocean in a warmer climate*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *Probabilistic estimates of AMOC evolution under future warming*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Perrette, M. et al.: *Robust reconstruction of the LGM climate*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Willeit, M. et al.: *Long-term future Greenland ice loss determined by peak global warming*. <span class="pub-status">in review</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Qian, Z., Liu, T., Bathiany, S., Yang, S., Hess, P., Bochow, N., Burmester, C., Gelbrecht, M., Groenke, B., Boers, N.: *Generative reconstruction mitigates biases in historical climate records*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Wang, S., Bochow, N., Boers, N., Shin, Y., Yun, K. S., Park, J. Y., …, Kug, J. S. (2025): *Mitigating Antarctic ice loss requires negative emissions*. <span class="pub-status">in prep</span> <span class="pub-project">FORCLIMA</span>
</div>

### 2025

_No entries yet._

## Conferences

### 2026

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *Investigating Stability of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation using CLIMBER-X*. **OSM 2026** <span class="pub-type-talk">Talk</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *TIPMIP AMOC simulations using CLIMBER-X*. **TIPMIP GA 2026** <span class="pub-type-poster">Poster</span>
</div>

### 2025

<div class="pub">
Grusdt, B. et al.: *Forming a robust estimate of the climate state through a model ensemble weighting approach*. **EGU 2025** <span class="pub-type-talk">Talk</span>
</div>

<div class="pub">
Höse, A. et al.: *Understanding multi-millennial variability in the Southern Ocean*. **EGU 2025** <span class="pub-type-poster">Poster</span>
</div>
